title: Card and PIN Authentication
description: The system shall authenticate users using their card and PIN.
rationale: This requirement ensures that user accounts are secure by requiring a valid card and PIN for access.
business_value: Improves account security, reducing the risk of unauthorized access.

source.description: As a user I need to authenticate using my card and PIN so that my account is secure.

acceptance_criteria: I am granted access to my account upon successful card and PIN authentication.
My account is automatically locked after a specified number of failed attempts.
preconditions: The user has a valid card and PIN.
postconditions: Failed attempts to authenticate are tracked.
functional_constraints: Authentication must be performed using a card and PIN.
Multiple failed authentication attempts must lock the account.
security_requirements: Card and PIN combination must be unique for each user.
The system must securely store and handle card and PIN data.

non_functional_requirements.performance: Authentication process should complete within 2 seconds.
non_functional_requirements.availability: The system must be available at least 99.9% of the time.
non_functional_requirements.scalability: The system must support up to 10,000 concurrent authentication requests without performance degradation.
non_functional_requirements.usability: Error messages should be clear and guide the user on how to resolve the issue.

edge_cases: What happens if the card is expired?
How does the system handle a PIN that is too short or too long?
What is the behavior when an invalid card and PIN are entered together?
How does the system respond to a card that is not recognized?
dependencies: Database for storing card and PIN data

interfaces.name: Authentication API
interfaces.description: Interface for authenticating users using their card and PIN.

interfaces.name: User Authentication Database
interfaces.description: Stores user card and PIN data for authentication purposes.

test_cases.description: Valid card and PIN entered successfully.
Invalid card but valid PIN entered multiple times.
Valid card and invalid PIN entered multiple times.

test_cases.expected_result: Error message indicating the card is expired.
